name: Sri Dharbaranyeswarar Temple
description: An incredibly famous and powerful Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Saturn (Saneeswarar). Millions of pilgrims visit this shrine seeking relief from astrological afflictions.
history: According to legend, King Nala was relieved of his afflictions by Lord Saneeswarar here. It is one of the Navagraha temples.
famousFor: Lord Saneeswarar shrine, Nala Theertham holy tank.
